1. **Performance Sensitivity Classification**: Yes
2. **Reason**: The "ANALYZE_AUTO" configuration is related to the automatic analysis of the database, which can significantly impact system performance. When this configuration is enabled, the system may perform additional operations such as indexing, statistics gathering, or query optimization, which can lead to variations in execution time and memory consumption. Changes to this configuration can cause the system to spend more or less time on these operations, affecting overall system performance.
